description: Style Notetonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric, this black and purple printed dress has an empire waist, padded inside the bust area, elasticated on the front and gathered from the waist downMaterial and CareShell 95% polyester and 5% spandex with a lining of 92% polyester and 8% spandexHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
